## Summary

Describe what this PR adds or changes.

- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] Prompt improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Template update

## Prompt Location

Path(s) changed:

## Why This Change

Explain the problem this prompt solves and who it helps.

## Validation

- [ ] I tested the prompt with at least one model
- [ ] The prompt has clear role, objective, constraints, and output format
- [ ] The file name is descriptive and uses lowercase with hyphens
- [ ] The prompt is placed under prompts/<domain>/<topic>/<prompt-name>.md
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly

## Example (Optional)

Provide a short example input/output if relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I am not submitting harmful, unsafe, or copyrighted content without rights
- [ ] This PR is focused and ready for review
